---
title: "R for Researchers"
subtitle: "3rd SARA Summer School 2026"
date: "2026-04-14"
author: "SARA Team"
image: flyer.png
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Contents"
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: left
    theme: cosmo
    #css: styles.css
    self-contained: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    page-layout: article
    title-block-banner: "#1e3a5f"
    title-block-banner-color: "#ffffff"
  #pdf:
    # documentclass: article
    # geometry:
    #   - top=25mm
    #   - bottom=25mm
    #   - left=25mm
    #   - right=25mm
    # colorlinks: true
    # linkcolor: "#2e6cb0"
    # fontsize: 11pt
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
categories: [R, Data Science, Summer School, Open]  
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.7; }

/* ── Event banner ── */
.event-banner {
  background: #1e3a5f;
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 36px 40px;
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.event-banner .edition {
  font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #7eb4e6; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.event-banner h2 {
  font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff;
  border: none; margin: 0 0 6px; padding: 0;
}
.event-banner .tagline {
  font-size: 16px; color: #a8cde8; margin-bottom: 22px;
}
.meta-row {
  display: flex; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 18px; font-size: 13px; color: #c8dff0;
}

/* ── Section label ── */
.section-label {
  font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .12em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: #888; margin-bottom: 14px;
}

/* ── Tier grid ── */
.tier-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 14px;
  margin: 1rem 0 0.5rem;
}
.tier {
  border-radius: 10px; padding: 20px 16px; text-align: center;
}
.tier.funded  { background: #edf7f0; border: 1.5px solid #4caf81; }
.tier.early   { background: #fff8ec; border: 2px   solid #e5a82a; }
.tier.regular { background: #f0f4f9; border: 1px   solid #ccd8e8; }

.tier .badge {
  font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .07em;
  text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px; display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.tier.funded  .badge { background: #c5ecd5; color: #1a6b3e; }
.tier.early   .badge { background: #fde9b0; color: #7a5200; }
.tier.regular .badge { background: #dce6f2; color: #1e3a5f; }

.tier .price  { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.tier.funded  .price { color: #1a6b3e; }
.tier.early   .price { color: #7a5200; }
.tier.regular .price { color: #1e3a5f; }

.tier .seats  { font-size: 12px; color: #777; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.tier .note   { font-size: 11px; color: #999; line-height: 1.5; }

.travel-note {
  font-size: 12px; color: #999; text-align: center; margin-top: 12px;
}

/* ── Included grid ── */
.included-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-top: 0.5rem;
}
.included-item {
  background: #f9f8f6; border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 9px 13px; font-size: 14px; color: #444;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
}
.included-item::before { content: '✓'; color: #4caf81; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* ── Who should apply ── */
.elig-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0.5rem 0 0; }
.elig-list li {
  font-size: 14px; color: #444;
  padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
  display: flex; gap: 10px;
}
.elig-list li:last-child { border: none; }
.elig-list li::before { content: '→'; color: #2e6cb0; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* ── Timeline ── */
.timeline { position: relative; padding-left: 24px; margin-top: 0.5rem; }
.timeline::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; left: 6px; top: 8px; bottom: 8px;
  width: 1.5px; background: #ddd;
}
.tl-item {
  position: relative; margin-bottom: 20px;
  display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start;
}
.tl-dot {
  width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
  position: absolute; left: -20px; top: 4px;
}
.tl-dot.amber { background: #e5a82a; }
.tl-dot.blue  { background: #2e6cb0; }
.tl-dot.red   { background: #d94040; }
.tl-dot.green { background: #4caf81; }
.tl-date  { font-size: 12px; color: #999; min-width: 100px; flex-shrink: 0; padding-top: 1px; }
.tl-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; }
.tl-desc  { font-size: 12px; color: #777; margin-top: 2px; }

/* ── CTA box ── */
.cta-box {
  background: #1e3a5f; border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 36px 40px; text-align: center; margin: 2rem 0;
}
.cta-box h3 { color: #fff; font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 8px; border: none; }
.cta-box p  { color: #a8cde8; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 22px; }
.cta-btn {
  display: inline-block; background: #e5a82a; color: #1a1a1a;
  font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; padding: 13px 36px;
  border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.cta-note { font-size: 12px; color: #7eb4e6; }

/* ── Footer strip ── */
.footer-strip {
  background: #f5f4f0; border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 20px 32px; text-align: center;
  font-size: 12px; color: #999; margin-top: 1.5rem;
}
.footer-strip strong { color: #555; }

/* ── Responsive ── */
@media (max-width: 560px) {
  .tier-grid        { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .included-grid    { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .meta-row         { gap: 10px; }
  .event-banner     { padding: 28px 20px; }
  .cta-box          { padding: 28px 20px; }
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!--  EVENT BANNER                                              -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="event-banner">
  <div class="edition">3rd Edition &middot; Non-profit Event</div>
  <h2>SARA Summer School</h2>
  <div class="tagline">R for Researchers</div>
  <div class="meta-row">
    <span>📅 22–26 July 2026</span>
    <span>📍 Offline &middot; In-person</span>
    <span>🎓 20 Seats Only</span>
    <span>💡 No Tuition Fee</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

## About the Summer School

We are excited to announce the **3rd SARA Summer School on R for Researchers** -- a five-day intensive, hands-on workshop designed to equip researchers with practical R programming skills for data analysis, visualisation, and reproducible research.

This is a **non-profit event with no tuition fee**. Participants only contribute toward food and accommodation. A limited number of fully funded seats are available for deserving applicants.

Whether you are new to R or looking to sharpen your analytical toolkit, this summer school offers an immersive learning experience with expert instructor in a collaborative setting.

![](speakers.png)

---

## What You will Learn 

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
### Lecture Modules at a Glance

| Detail | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Day 1** | Introduction to R & RStudio  |
| **Day 2** | Data Import, Wrangling & Cleaning |
| **Day 3** | Data Visualization & Exploratory Analysis |
| **Day 4** | Statistical Analysis & Reproducible Research |
| **Day 5** | Qualitative/Test Analysis & Sentiment Analysis |

:::

---

## Seat Categories & Fees

```{=html}
<div class="section-label">Registration tiers</div>
<div class="tier-grid">

  <div class="tier funded">
    <span class="badge">Fully Funded</span>
    <div class="price">₹0</div>
    <div class="seats">5 seats available</div>
    <div class="note">Apply by 31 May. Food & Stay costs covered. Need-based.</div>
  </div>

  <div class="tier early">
    <span class="badge">Early Bird — 40% off</span>
    <div class="price">₹2,700</div>
    <div class="seats">7 seats available</div>
    <div class="note">Apply by 30 April 2026. Regular fee is ₹4,500.</div>
  </div>

  <div class="tier regular">
    <span class="badge">Regular</span>
    <div class="price">₹4,500</div>
    <div class="seats">8 seats available</div>
    <div class="note">Final Deadline 15 June. Food &amp; accommodation for 5 days.</div>
  </div>

</div>
<p class="travel-note">No travel reimbursement. Participants are responsible for their own travel to the venue.</p>
```

---

## What's Included

```{=html}
<div class="included-grid">
  <div class="included-item">5 days of hands-on R training</div>
  <div class="included-item">Food (all meals) for 5 days</div>
  <div class="included-item">Shared accommodation (5 nights)</div>
  <div class="included-item">Course materials &amp; datasets</div>
  <div class="included-item">Certificate of completion</div>
  <div class="included-item">Networking with fellow researchers</div>
</div>
```

---

## Who Should Apply

```{=html}
<ul class="elig-list">
  <li>Researchers, PhD students, and postdocs in any discipline</li>
  <li>Faculty members looking to incorporate R into their teaching or research</li>
  <li>Graduate students with a research component in their programme</li>
  <li>Professionals in research-adjacent roles (public health, policy, analytics)</li>
  <li>No prior programming experience required — beginners are welcome</li>
</ul>
```

---

## Key Dates

```{=html}
<div class="timeline">

  <div class="tl-item">
    <span class="tl-dot amber"></span>
    <span class="tl-date">14 Apr 2026</span>
    <div>
      <div class="tl-title">Applications open</div>
      <div class="tl-desc">Early bird &amp; regular applications open simultaneously</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item">
    <span class="tl-dot amber"></span>
    <span class="tl-date">30 Apr 2026</span>
    <div>
      <div class="tl-title">Early bird deadline</div>
      <div class="tl-desc">Last date to apply for 40% discounted seats</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item">
    <span class="tl-dot amber"></span>
    <span class="tl-date">31 May 2026</span>
    <div>
      <div class="tl-title">Funded seat applications close</div>
      <div class="tl-desc">Last date for fully funded seat applications</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item">
    <span class="tl-dot blue"></span>
    <span class="tl-date">15 Jun 2026</span>
    <div>
      <div class="tl-title">Regular registration closes</div>
      <div class="tl-desc">Final deadline for all applications</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item">
    <span class="tl-dot red"></span>
    <span class="tl-date">30 Jun 2026</span>
    <div>
      <div class="tl-title">Last date for cancellation with 50% refund</div>
      <div class="tl-desc">No refund after this date</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tl-item">
    <span class="tl-dot green"></span>
    <span class="tl-date">22–26 Jul 2026</span>
    <div>
      <div class="tl-title">🎓 Summer School</div>
      <div class="tl-desc">Five days of R training -- offline, in-person</div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

---

## Apply Now

```{=html}
<div class="cta-box">
  <h3>Applications closing 15 June 2026</h3>
  <p>Only 20 seats available -- including 5 fully funded spots.<br>
  Mark your calendar and share with your network.</p>
  <a href="https://forms.gle/JMEGpNXk5ve2yu6a9" class="cta-btn">Apply Now</a>
  <div class="cta-note">Questions? Write to us at: sara.institute.info@gmail.com</div>
</div>
```

> **Refund policy:** Cancellations on or before 30 June 2026 are eligible for a 50% refund. No refund will be issued after this date. Funded seats carry no monetary refund.

<center>

<a href="flyer.png" download class="btn btn-primary">
  ⬇️ Download Flyer
</a>

</center>

---

```{=html}
<div class="footer-strip">
  <strong>SARA Summer School</strong> &middot; 3rd Edition &middot; 22–26 July 2026<br>
  Non-profit Event &middot; No Tuition Fee &middot; Limited Seats<br>
  Organised by SARA &middot; Share freely with researchers and students 
</div>
```
